calendar.matters:
MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Apr-24-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ALEXANDER GLAVIN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS

Appearances:
Alexander Glavin (628.236.9080) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona; No other appearances.

Defendant did not give notice of his intent to appear this morning. This matter is not argued. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: denied without prejudice to being refiled with a proof of service showing compliance with CCP 1005. Glavin did not file a proof of service of this motion. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
